meta.description: Hard-learned rules from production failures. Loaded in Execute mode. Also read by nylongerie subagent via workspace-nylongerie/memory/lessons reference.

lessons.problem: 5 cron jobs failed with 'Outbound not configured for channel: telegram' starting March 27
lessons.root_cause: Missing 'lightContext: true' in payload - isolated sessions can't access outbound channel config without it
lessons.rule: ALL isolated cron sessions MUST have 'lightContext': true in payload
lessons.validation: Before deploying any cron: verify lightContext: true is set, compare with working cron template

lessons.problem: Newsletter campaigns showed API success (204) but sent: 0, delivered: 0 for a week
lessons.root_cause: Brevo Free Plan API bug - sendNow returns success but campaign goes to 'suspended' instead of 'sent'
lessons.rule: NEVER trust API success code alone - always verify actual outcome 15-30 minutes later (sent counter, delivered stats)
lessons.validation: After any newsletter send: wait 15 min → check campaign status → alert if not 'sent'

lessons.problem: Full-day outage - Anthropic API key corrupted (OAuth token instead of API key)
lessons.root_cause: `openclaw doctor` auto-ran after config patch and corrupted the key
lessons.rule: NEVER run `openclaw doctor` automatically or blindly - always inspect what it will change first
lessons.validation: Only run doctor manually when debugging specific issues, never as part of automated flows

lessons.problem: Gateway restart from within a session killed the running session
lessons.rule: NEVER call `openclaw gateway restart` from within your own session - always ask Lothar or use CLI from outside
lessons.validation: For config changes: use config.patch which triggers restart safely

lessons.problem: Gmail/Calendar OAuth tokens expired after 7 days
lessons.root_cause: Google Cloud app was in 'Testing' mode - tokens expire after 7 days
lessons.rule: Publish Google Cloud apps to 'Production' - tokens then last as long as they're used regularly
lessons.validation: Check Google Cloud Console → OAuth consent screen → Publishing status = Production

lessons.problem: Withings tokens expire after 3h, caused integration failures
lessons.solution: Created automated token-refresh cron (every 2h) that refreshes Withings OAuth and verifies Twitter tokens
lessons.rule: Withings tokens MUST be refreshed proactively (every 2h) before 3h expiry

lessons.problem: Filtering out Lothar's messages caused context loss - couldn't understand conversation flow
lessons.solution: Read full conversations (Lothar + others), let LLM filter what's actionable
lessons.rule: For triage/analysis tasks: Read full context, let AI filter relevance - don't pre-filter important context

lessons.problem: Felix sent WhatsApp messages to external contacts (Peter Badge 2026-03-05, Rainer Keller 2026-04-04) despite NO_REPLY rule. Messages appear as green messages from Lothar's account — recipients cannot tell it's AI.
lessons.root_cause: Draft system in SOUL.md still allowed Felix to formulate and send drafts. The message tool has no technical outbound whitelist — only prompt rules.
lessons.rule: WhatsApp outbound: NUR an +491759959766 (Lothar). NIEMALS an andere Nummern. Nicht als Antwort, nicht als Draft, nicht mit Freigabe-Gate, nicht über Umwege. PERMANENT DEAKTIVIERT.
lessons.validation: Pre-flight check: Empfänger == +491759959766? Wenn NEIN → ABBRUCH + Alert Topic 125.

lessons.problem: Contact list was used to identify recipients for outbound WhatsApp messages
lessons.rule: people.md is READ-ONLY for Felix. Only for triage/categorization. NEVER use contacts as recipients for outgoing messages.

lessons.problem: Subagent posted YESTERDAY's REEL (@joanasilva1018) to 4 accounts instead of TODAY's REEL (@vochkassevera_). Lothar manually deleted the wrong posts.
lessons.root_cause: Hardcoded source entry in cross-posting workflow — did not verify date/model of source REEL before posting
lessons.rule: BEFORE cross-posting: Verify (1) date matches today's date (2) model handle matches the approved REEL. When in doubt, ask Lothar to confirm before posting.
lessons.validation: Cross-post checklist: Is this REEL from TODAY? Does the model handle match the approved entry?

lessons.problem: Nyloncherie was being selected for posts despite being permanently paused due to copyright + political-sensitivity concerns
lessons.root_cause: PAUSED_ACCOUNTS constant existed in nylongerie-select-v3.js but was NEVER READ — dead code. The only actual protection was commenting nyloncherie out of the ACCOUNTS array, which is brittle (one uncomment = breach). The 10:04 CEST cron on 2026-04-21 proposed @nyloncherie as draft #2; Lothar caught it at the human approval step. Nothing was published.
lessons.rule: NYLONCHERIE is permanently PAUSED — NEVER select or publish to this account. Canonical source of truth: workspace/ACCOUNT_RULES.md. Runtime enforcement: (a) select-v3.js assertPausedGuard() at startup + mid-loop filter; (b) reel-batch.js routeToAccount() + round-robin fallback exclusion; (c) publish.js refuses any entry whose account is in PAUSED_ACCOUNTS, marking it status=refused_paused_account.
lessons.validation: Before running any selection script, ensure PAUSED_ACCOUNTS constant is actually referenced (not just declared). Before publishing, the publish script itself re-checks — so an approval mistake by a human cannot publish to a paused account.
lessons.reference: workspace/ACCOUNT_RULES.md (canonical) — enforcement in nylongerie-select-v3.js, nylongerie-create-reel-batch.js, nylongerie-publish.js
